---
title: Skip-to-content link
toc: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      ensureHtmlElements:
        -
          # skip link is the first element of the body
          - 'body > a#quarto-skip-link:first-child[href="#quarto-document-content"]'
          # target is focusable via the link
          - 'main#quarto-document-content[tabindex="-1"]'
        - []
---

HTML documents should include a "Skip to main content" link as the first
element of the body so that keyboard users can bypass navigation blocks
such as the TOC (<https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-cli/issues/14684>,
WCAG 2.4.1 Bypass Blocks).

## Section One

Some text with a [link](https://example.com).

## Section Two

More text.
